name: Appian Corp.
lede: Appian runs one capability center in Chennai. Chennai, covering it, built over four years.
insight: A single Appian center is easy to miss and easier to misread. We track its type, functions and the people who run it, so you can decide if it belongs on your target list.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Appian operate in India?
faq.a: Appian operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Appian have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Appian's India GCC presence is in Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Appian run in India?
faq.a: Appian runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Appian's India GCCs?
faq.a: Appian's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Appian's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Appian's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
